title: KBFPCL – Plant Manager – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited (KBFPCL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Plant Manager. Candidates with MVSc Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through KBFPCL official website.

basic_details.job_title: KBFPCL Plant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited (KBFPCL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Plant Manager. Candidates with MVSc Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through KBFPCL official website.

qualification.education_qualification: MVSc Graduate in Livestock Products Technology, BVSc Graduate

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.keralachicken.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited Plant Manager Recruitment 2026
